title: Roller blinds Thermal Blackout Roller blind - Trimmable UV Protection Child Safe Home Office Window Blinds Easy Fit Room Darkening shades Light Grey Blind 60cm wide x165cm drop
features: Material: Thermal insulated blackout roller blinds are made of 100% Polyester with triple layer insulation technology give you complete privacy and different layers of fabric block the sunlight for you. Our blackout roller blinds are perfectly suitable for kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, living room windows and doors where you want to keep the heat "out" in Summer and "In" in Winter.

Inside and Outside Mount: Our blackout blinds come in a wide variety of colors. Roller blinds are primarily for outside frame fitting to block light completely, but they can also be fitted inside if preferred. Please note that these are not recommended for side mounting due to its rolling nature.

Metal Tube: 25 mm metal tube which can easily be trimmed to fit sidewinder action that can be fitted on the left or right. Widths are mentioned before drops in all sizes in 60 x 165cm, width is 60cm and drop is 165cm. The blind width measurement includes the fixings; hence the fabric will be approximately 3.5cm narrower. If you order a 120cm blind, the fabric will be approximately 117cm.

Fittings & Tube: All instructions and child safety fittings are included, can be fitted inside or outside recess. Mounting brackets are top and face fixing. Please note that old fittings has not spring mechanism as it ma be mentioned in instructions manual. Our blinds have 25mm metal tube with 0.6mm thickness for sizes from 60cm to 180cm. For 210cm & 240cm blinds we provide 38mm metal tube with 0.8mm thickness that makes our blinds exceptionally durable from others.

Roller blinds can be cleaned with damp cloth and maintained easily, especially in comparison to shutter blinds that need each slat to be dusted and cleaned. These blinds can be easily trimmed with a sharp pair of scissors or hacksaw. Roller blinds are 100% blackout because they have saved energy and the light cannot pass from gaps.

Fitting Instructions: Blackout Roller Blinds have plastic fittings can be easily fit as they are easy to operate by following the instructions manual. Metal brackets can be mounted on top & face fixed according to the window. Face mounting: face of outside the window frame. Top mounting: an overhead surface such as the top of the window recess or the ceiling. All sizes are approximate.

Please Note: Actual colour of the products may be different from the image for illustration purpose. Images are only for illustration purpose. Colors can be slightly different and Smooth continued loop chain if there is your child or pet stuck into this you can push it by force and prevent them from any damage or injury.
description: Product Description Thermal Insulated blackout roller blinds are made of 100% polyester with triple layer insulation technology give you complete privacy and different layer of fabric block the sunlight for you. Roller blinds are perfectly suitable for kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, living room windows and doors. Please Note: Thermal blackout roller blinds available only 2 drops 165cm and 210cm with multiple widths e.g., 60cm, 90cm, 120cm, 150cm, 180cm, 210cm and 240cm with different colours to make your choice easy to décor your homes.
